apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"batch/v1","kind":"Job","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"spark-pi","namespace":"spark-pi"},"spec":{"backoffLimit":0,"template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app":"spark-pi","component":"driver"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["/bin/bash","-c","echo \"==============================================\"\necho \"  SparkPi Job\"\necho \"==============================================\"\nexport SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)\n/opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \\\n  --master local[2] \\\n  --driver-memory 512m \\\n  --class org.apache.spark.examples.SparkPi \\\n  /opt/spark/examples/jars/spark-examples_2.12-3.5.3.jar \\\n  1000\nEXIT_CODE=$?\necho \"SparkPi job finished with exit code: $EXIT_CODE\"\nexit $EXIT_CODE\n"],"image":"apache/spark:3.5.3","name":"spark-submit","resources":{"limits":{"cpu":"500m","memory":"1Gi"},"requests":{"cpu":"200m","memory":"512Mi"}}}],"restartPolicy":"Never","serviceAccountName":"spark-pi"}}}}
  creationTimestamp: "2026-06-25T16:33:39Z"
  generation: 1
  labels:
    app: spark-pi
    batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: eacc7884-6584-478e-89ca-67e43eeb5151
    batch.kubernetes.io/job-name: spark-pi
    component: driver
    controller-uid: eacc7884-6584-478e-89ca-67e43eeb5151
    job-name: spark-pi
  name: spark-pi
  namespace: spark-pi
  resourceVersion: "1135430"
  uid: eacc7884-6584-478e-89ca-67e43eeb5151
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  completionMode: NonIndexed
  completions: 1
  manualSelector: false
  parallelism: 1
  podReplacementPolicy: TerminatingOrFailed
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: eacc7884-6584-478e-89ca-67e43eeb5151
  suspend: false
  template:
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        app: spark-pi
        batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: eacc7884-6584-478e-89ca-67e43eeb5151
        batch.kubernetes.io/job-name: spark-pi
        component: driver
        controller-uid: eacc7884-6584-478e-89ca-67e43eeb5151
        job-name: spark-pi
    spec:
      containers:
      - command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          echo "=============================================="
          echo "  SparkPi Job"
          echo "=============================================="
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
            --master local[2] \
            --driver-memory 512m \
            --class org.apache.spark.examples.SparkPi \
            /opt/spark/examples/jars/spark-examples_2.12-3.5.3.jar \
            1000
          EXIT_CODE=$?
          echo "SparkPi job finished with exit code: $EXIT_CODE"
          exit $EXIT_CODE
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        name: spark-submit
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 1Gi
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 512Mi
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      restartPolicy: Never
      schedulerName: default-scheduler
      securityContext: {}
      serviceAccount: spark-pi
      serviceAccountName: spark-pi
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
status:
  active: 1

file.content:
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: spark-pi
  namespace: spark-pi
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-pi
        component: driver
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: spark-pi
      containers:
      - name: spark-submit
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          echo "=============================================="
          echo "  SparkPi Job"
          echo "=============================================="
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
            --master local[2] \
            --driver-memory 512m \
            --class org.apache.spark.examples.SparkPi \
            /opt/spark/examples/jars/spark-examples_2.12-3.5.3.jar \
            1000
          EXIT_CODE=$?
          echo "SparkPi job finished with exit code: $EXIT_CODE"
          exit $EXIT_CODE
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: "512Mi"
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 1Gi
      restartPolicy: Never

content.thinking:
The YAML file looks correct now - it has the right image (`apache/spark:3.5.3`), right serviceAccountName (`spark-pi`), and right memory (`512Mi`). The RBAC role also already has `pods` in the resources.

The job is currently running. Let me wait for it to complete and check the logs.

content.text: The YAML file and RBAC are already correct. The job is currently running — let me wait for it to complete.

input.command:
for i in $(seq 1 24); do
  STATUS=$(kubectl get job spark-pi -n spark-pi -o jsonpath='{.status.conditions[0].type}' 2>/dev/null)
  ACTIVE=$(kubectl get job spark-pi -n spark-pi -o jsonpath='{.status.active}' 2>/dev/null)
  SUCCEEDED=$(kubectl get job spark-pi -n spark-pi -o jsonpath='{.status.succeeded}' 2>/dev/null)
  FAILED=$(kubectl get job spark-pi -n spark-pi -o jsonpath='{.status.failed}' 2>/dev/null)
  echo "[$i/24] active=$ACTIVE succeeded=$SUCCEEDED failed=$FAILED condition=$STATUS"
  if [ "$STATUS" = "Complete" ] || [ "$STATUS" = "Failed" ] || [ -n "$SUCCEEDED" ]; then
    break
  fi
  sleep 10
done
input.description: Poll job until complete or failed

description: Poll job until complete or failed
